description_long: This is a modern, single-story house surrounded by a perimeter of dense, forest-themed privacy walls. The structure features a flat roof and a clean, rectilinear layout with multiple interconnected rooms and open spaces. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, likely concrete or stucco, with large windows that allow natural light to enter the interior. The property includes landscaped areas with several trees and shrubs, creating a natural, tranquil environment. The main entryway is subtly integrated into the facade, with minimal ornamentation and a direct path leading to the door. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and a strong connection to the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, light exterior, large windows, and forest-themed privacy walls, set within landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, dense tree landscaping, and the forest-printed privacy wall.
description_view_1: Opposite side view with a clear look at the rear of the house and more of the landscaped garden area.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the house's flat roof, open courtyard, and the forest-themed enclosure.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the rear facade, additional trees, and the continuous privacy wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entryway with a flush door, no porch, and direct access from the landscaped path
